##RRUFFID=R060348
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Sr_2_B_11_O_16_(OH)_5_·H_2_O
##LOCALITY=1360' level, 2S Drift, Billie mine, Death Valley, Inyo County, California, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Transparent white fibrous and platy mass
